home.title: Hi, I'm Menghoung
home.subtitle: I am a passionate Web Developer with strong knowledge in front-end development and basic back-end understanding. I specialize in building responsive, user-friendly, and modern websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Vue.js. I am looking for an opportunity to contribute to a professional development team and grow my technical skills.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am passionate about networking and web development.

items.title: Introduction to Cybersecurity
